name: CREATIVE MEDICAL TECHNOLOGY HOLDINGS, INC.
business: We are a commercial stage biotechnology company dedicated to the advancement regenerative therapies in the fields of immunotherapy, endocrinology, urology, neurology and orthopedics. Our subsidiary, Creative Medical Technologies, Inc., was originally created to monetize U.S. Patent No. 8,372,797 and related intellectual property related to the treatment of erectile dysfunction. We generated $6,000 in gross revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025, primarily from CaverStem kit sales.
sellsTo: patients with chronic lower back pain

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial stage biotechnology company dedicated to the advancement regenerative therapies in the fields of immunotherapy, endocrinology, urology, neurology and orthopedics.
In July 2024, we announced that we initiated a program to diagnose and treat patients exposed to biological and chemical weapons by combining artificial intelligence (AI) with our proprietary iPSC.

In February, 2025 we announced an expanded agreement with Greenstone Biosciences Inc. to leverage artificial intelligence (AI) in further developing our human induced pluripotent stem cell (iPSC) platform for diabetes treatment.

In October, 2025 we launched the BioDefense Veterans Initiative, believed to be a first-of-its-kind national program to combat the devastating long-term effects of toxic burn pit exposure among U.S. service members.

catalysts.event: Enroll second cohort in CELZ-201 ADAPT trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to enroll the second cohort in this trial in the first quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: FDA cleared expanded dose escalation for StemSpine trial
catalysts.sentence: In March, 2025 we announced the FDA had cleared an expanded dose escalation for our ongoing Phase 1/2 trial of StemSpine using AlloStem (CELZ-201-DDT).

catalysts.event: FDA granted Fast Track designation to CELZ-201-DDT
catalysts.sentence: In August, 2025 we announced the FDA granted Fast Track designation to its lead investigational therapy, CELZ-201-DDT.

catalysts.event: Completed patient enrollment in ADAPT clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: In December, 2025 we announced the successful completion of patient enrollment on the ADAPT clinical trial evaluating CELZ-201 (Olastrocel).

tamClaims.claim: Estimated 2.6 million U.S. patients with degenerative disc disease in 2021, increasing to nearly 4 million by 2028
tamClaims.sentence: A recent study reported that an estimated 2.6 million patients in the U.S. will have suffered from degenerative disc disease in 2021, with the number increasing to close to four million patients in 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Estimated nine million U.S. men with ED unresponsive to PDE5 inhibitors
tamClaims.sentence: The procedure has been demonstrated safe and effective in clinical trials and is geared to the estimated nine million men in the United States that suffer from ED and do not respond to PDE5 inhibitors in drugs such as Viagra and Cialis due to damage to smooth muscle and blood vessels.
